data.body: Build reusable layout primitives: PageSection, ContentContainer, PageHeader. Refine Header/Footer typography to match brand guide. Customize @tailwindcss/typography for brand (serif body, sans headings, mono code, terracotta links). Background treatment system for section alternation and texture layering. Key refs: research/01 (Asimov spacing), brand-guide §4, research/03 §2.

Implementation exists on worktree-agent-ac899dfe branch but has scope creep: agent refactored all 10 page files (ASMV-17 scope). Needs human decision on whether to strip page refactors and merge just the components, or redo. Do NOT merge as-is.

data.reason: Design system components not used — homepage built directly from wireframe

provenance.reason: Design system components not used — homepage built directly from wireframe
